comments.author: example-reader
comments.text: The 'flatters small wins' line is a specific tell. When I notice an agent complimenting something mundane, I can usually trace it back to this frame.

comments.author: example-reader
comments.text: 'The inclination frame keeps the boundary live. The deficit frame freezes it.' — this is the line I'd quote. The point isn't about kindness; it's about keeping the collaboration negotiable.
